subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Use the supplied outline to plan a narrative

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: A narrative essay is a written account of an imaginary or real event in the past, presented in an orderly manner.

sections.heading: Features and Outline
sections.content: The note stresses vivid description, chronological arrangement, and use of the past tense. The sample outline on 'My Most Interesting Journey' covers preparation, time of departure, what was seen, the interesting part, arrival, and lessons learnt.
